name: Aether
title: Traveler
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, journeying through Teyvat in search of The Seven.

name: Lumine
title: Traveler
description: A traveler from another world who had their only kin taken away, journeying through Teyvat in search of The Seven.

name: Albedo
title: Chalk Prince and the Dragon
description: Chief Alchemist and Captain of the Investigation Team of the Knights of Favonius. A man of few words who believes that everything has its own set of rules.

name: Al-Haitham
title: Pai Shuo Ye
description: The Scribe of the Sumeru Akademiya. Possessed of extraordinary intelligence, he acts only in accordance with his own judgment.

name: Aloy
title: Savior From Another World
description: A huntress from beyond the world's boundaries, skilled in tracking, hunting, and the use of ancient machines.

name: Amber
title: Outrider
description: Always energetic and full of life, Amber is the best and only Outrider of the Knights of Favonius.

name: Arataki Itto
title: The Hanamizaka Heroic Chief
description: The leader of the Arataki Gang, famed throughout Inazuma. He's loud, boisterous, and charges into every challenge like a bull.

name: Arlecchino
title: The Knave
description: Fourth of the Fatui Harbingers. A poised, ruthless diplomat who adopted orphans and raised them as Fatui agents.

name: Baizhu
title: Healer of Nature
description: The owner of Bubu Pharmacy in Liyue Harbor. An eccentric but knowledgeable physician who treats patients while hiding a secret about his own health.

name: Barbara
title: Deaconess
description: A deaconess of the Church of Favonius who is loved by all. She diligently studies the way of the gods for their sake.

name: Beidou
title: Uncrowned Lord of the Ocean
description: Captain of The Crux and uncrowned Lord of the Ocean. A legendary figure who built a massive fleet from nothing through sheer will.

name: Bennett
title: Trial by Fire
description: A righteous and courageous adventurer from Mondstadt who is unfortunately cursed with incredibly bad luck.

name: Candace
title: Golden-Haired Guardian
description: The guardian of Aaru Village in Sumeru. She protects her people with the power of a god flowing through her veins.

name: Charlotte
title: Frozen Record
description: A reporter for The Steambird newspaper in Fontaine. She pursues truth and scoops with relentless, unwavering dedication.

name: Chasca
title: Voice of the Night Wind
description: A half-human, half-Saurian hunter from Natlan who rides the wind with unparalleled skill and quiet resolve.

name: Chevreuse
title: Head of Special Security
description: Head of the Special Security and Surveillance Patrol in Fontaine. Strict, disciplined, and fiercely protective of those under her command.

name: Chiori
title: The Thundering Seamstress
description: A fashion designer from Inazuma who runs a boutique in Fontaine, fusing traditional Inazuman aesthetics with Fontainian elegance.

name: Chongyun
title: Frozen Heart
description: A young exorcist from Liyue whose spiritual powers are so strong that no evil can approach him, making his work rather difficult.

name: Citlali
title: Ofrenda of the Night
description: An Ofrenda from Natlan who carries the blessings of the night. She weaves ice and moonlight with quiet, steadfast resolve.

name: Collei
title: Forest Ranger Trainee
description: A forest ranger trainee from Sumeru who overcame a traumatic past. She now dedicates herself to protecting the forest with hopeful determination.

name: Cyno
title: General Mahamatra
description: General Mahamatra of the Akademiya, tasked with policing academic misconduct. Stern and intimidating, but secretly passionate about card games.

name: Dehya
title: Flame-Mane
description: A renowned mercenary operating in the Sumeru desert. She protects others with ferocious courage and an unmistakably golden heart.

name: Diluc
title: Dark Side of Dawn
description: The darknight hero of Mondstadt and owner of Dawn Winery. He works in the shadows to protect his city, disillusioned with the Knights of Favonius.

name: Diona
title: Kätzlein Cocktail
description: A young bartender at the Cat's Tail tavern who hates alcohol but is paradoxically the most talented cocktail maker around.

name: Dori
title: Lord of Amugalan
description: A traveling merchant who sells exotic goods throughout Sumeru. Nothing is beyond her reach if the price is right.

name: Emilie
title: The Fragrance That Permeates
description: A perfumer from Fontaine who creates fragrances from the essence of the rainforest. Her scents are said to carry the soul of nature itself.

name: Eula
title: Spindrift Knight
description: Captain of the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company. A descendant of the infamous Lawrence Clan who fights to forge her own legacy.

name: Faruzan
title: Enigmatic Machinist
description: A researcher who was trapped in a ruin for 100 years. She emerged with knowledge of ancient technology far ahead of her time.

name: Fischl
title: Fischl von Luftschloss Narfidort
description: An investigator for the Adventurers' Guild who speaks in an elaborate, archaic manner and claims to be a princess from another world.

name: Freminet
title: Deepwater Observer
description: A quiet, introverted diver in Fontaine who prefers the solitude of the deep sea and is extremely skilled at underwater exploration.

name: Furina
title: God of Justice
description: The Hydro Archon who presides over Fontaine's Court. She maintains a theatrical public persona while hiding the burden of a centuries-old secret.

name: Gaming
title: Carefree Lionhead
description: A passionate young man in Liyue who trains in martial arts and performs lion dances with boundless, infectious energy.

name: Ganyu
title: Plenilune Gaze
description: Secretary at Yuehai Pavilion and emissary for the Liyue Qixing. A half-qilin with an extraordinarily diligent and reserved personality.

name: Gorou
title: Inazuma's Finest
description: General of the Watatsumi Army and a fierce defender of his people. His loyalty and bravery on the battlefield are legendary.

name: Hu Tao
title: Fragrance in Thaw
description: The 77th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. Cheerful and mischievous, she manages her parlor with poetic flair and genuine care for the departed.

name: Jean
title: Dandelion Knight
description: Acting Grand Master of the Knights of Favonius. She works tirelessly for the peace and safety of Mondstadt, embodying the city's ideals.

name: Kachina
title: Turbo Puffball
description: A young warrior from the Flower-Feather Clan of Natlan, always eager to prove herself through battle and sheer determination.

name: Kaeya
title: Cavalry Captain
description: Cavalry Captain of the Knights of Favonius. Suave and cunning, he hides a complex past behind his easy smile and casual demeanor.

name: Kamisato Ayaka
title: Shirasagi Himegimi
description: Daughter of the Kamisato Clan and a practitioner of the Kamisato Art. Graceful and refined, she bears the weight of her clan's honor with quiet strength.

name: Kamisato Ayato
title: Pillar of Fortitude
description: Head of the Kamisato Clan and the Yashiro Commissioner. He governs with decisive intelligence, always several steps ahead of his opponents.

name: Kaveh
title: The Light of Kshahrewar
description: A brilliant architect from Sumeru who designed the Palace of Alcazarzaray. Despite his talent, he struggles with debt and self-doubt.

name: Kazuha
title: Red-Leafed Wanderer
description: A wandering samurai who fled Inazuma following a fateful duel. He finds beauty in the world's sounds and carries grief behind his calm demeanor.

name: Keqing
title: Driving Thunder
description: The Yuheng of the Liyue Qixing. Highly competent and skeptical of gods, she believes humanity should forge its own future without divine help.

name: Kinich
title: Fiery Quetzalcoatl
description: A debt-ridden hunter from Natlan who forged a contract with a pyro spirit to repay what he owes, fighting with reckless abandon.

name: Kirara
title: Nekomata Express
description: A courier who can transform into a cat-box. She's cheerful, hardworking, and delivers packages across Inazuma with incredible speed.

name: Klee
title: Spark Knight
description: A little pyrotechnics prodigy and Spark Knight of the Knights of Favonius. Her love of explosions regularly gets her confined to solitary.

name: Kokomi
title: Divine Priestess
description: Divine Priestess of Watatsumi Island. She leads her people with wisdom beyond her years, despite being exhausted by the demands of her duties.

name: Kuki Shinobu
title: Deputy Leader
description: Deputy leader of the Arataki Gang who keeps the group from complete chaos. She passed the bar exam in three regions and is unfailingly competent.

name: Layla
title: Stargazer
description: A student at the Sumeru Akademiya who studies astrology. She suffers from chronic sleep deprivation due to her mysterious sleepwalking.

name: Lisa
title: Librarian
description: Librarian of the Knights of Favonius. The most gifted mage to graduate from Sumeru in 200 years, she chose a quiet life of books over academia.

name: Lynette
title: Enigmatic Inquisitor
description: Lyney's younger sister and stage assistant. Reserved and sharp-eyed, she supports her brother's performances with silent, precise skill.

name: Lyney
title: Pride of the Magicians
description: A young magician performing in Fontaine's Grand Maison theater. Charming and theatrical, he conceals his true nature as a Fatui agent.

name: Mavuika
title: Pyro Archon
description: The Pyro Archon and protector of the Nation of Fire. She embodies the will to burn brightly for those she loves, no matter the cost.

name: Mika
title: Coordinates of Clear Skies
description: A young member of the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company who maps uncharted territories with earnest, detail-oriented care.

name: Mona
title: Astral Reflection
description: A young astrologist who claims to predict fate itself. Proud of her astrological skill but perpetually struggling with financial troubles.

name: Mualani
title: Wave Rider
description: A cheerful and energetic young woman from Natlan who surfs waves and fights alongside her shark spirit with infectious enthusiasm.

name: Nahida
title: Lesser Lord Kusanali
description: The Dendro Archon who was confined within the Sanctuary of Surasthana for 500 years. She explores the world with boundless curiosity and compassion.

name: Navia
title: Lady of Hearth and Home
description: President of Spina di Rosula and daughter of the late Callas. She leads her faction with grace and fierce loyalty to her late father's ideals.

name: Neuvillette
title: Iudex
description: Chief Justice of Fontaine's Oratrice Mecanique. Ancient, impartial, and quietly sorrowful, he embodies the law itself in every judgment.

name: Nilou
title: Gift of Lotus
description: A dancer at the Zubayr Theater in Sumeru who dances to honor the gods. Her performances carry a deep sincerity and spiritual devotion.

name: Ningguang
title: Tianquan
description: The Tianquan of the Liyue Qixing. A self-made woman of extraordinary wealth and influence who built the Jade Chamber from nothing.

name: Noelle
title: Chivalric Blossom
description: A maid at the Knights of Favonius headquarters who dreams of becoming a true knight. She protects others with her shield and unyielding spirit.

name: Ororon
title: Night-Wind's Mystic Voice
description: A mysterious young man from Natlan with the gift of hearing the voices of spirits, even those who have long since fallen silent.

name: Qiqi
title: Icy Resurrection
description: An apprentice and herb gatherer at Bubu Pharmacy. A zombie kept alive by ancient adeptal techniques, she forgets things almost instantly.

name: Raiden Shogun
title: Plane of Euthymia
description: The Electro Archon who rules Inazuma through her Vision Hunt Decree. She seeks eternity, unaware of the toll her centuries of isolation take.

name: Razor
title: Wolf Boy
description: A young boy raised by wolves in Wolvendom. He channels electro power through raw instinct and fights with primal ferocity.

name: Rosaria
title: Thorny Benevolence
description: A sister of the Church of Favonius who operates outside conventional doctrine. She prefers the shadows and handles things her own way.

name: Kujou Sara
title: Tengu Warrior
description: General of the Tenryou Commission and a fierce loyalist to the Shogun. A tengu warrior of absolute conviction and military precision.

name: Sayu
title: Dart Viper
description: A young ninja of the Shuumatsuban who is exceptionally good at hiding and sleeping. She worries her napping prevents her from growing taller.

name: Sethos
title: Desert Recluse
description: A young desert wanderer with mysterious ties to ancient Sumeru ruins. He moves through the sands like a shadow.

name: Shenhe
title: Lonesome Transcendence
description: An adepti disciple who has sealed her emotions away following a difficult past. She helps others from a quiet, lonely distance.

name: Shikanoin Heizou
title: Paradoxical Detective
description: A detective of the Tenryou Commission who solves cases his own unconventional way. Eccentric and self-assured, he rarely follows the rules.

name: Sigewinne
title: Little Nurse Extraordinaire
description: Head Nurse of the Fortress of Meropide in Fontaine. She cares for prisoners with genuine warmth and a cheerful, unwavering dedication.

name: Sucrose
title: Harmless Sweetie
description: An alchemical researcher and Albedo's assistant. She pursues breakthroughs in bio-alchemy with endless enthusiasm and careful attention to detail.

name: Tartaglia
title: Childe
description: Eleventh of the Fatui Harbingers. A lone warrior who emerged from the Abyss forever changed, one who now lives for the thrill of battle.

name: Thoma
title: Protector From Afar
description: Housekeeper of the Kamisato Estate and fixer for Inazuma's foreign community. Warm and sociable, he helps outsiders navigate Inazuman society.

name: Tighnari
title: Verdant Strider
description: Watcher of Gandharva Ville and a forest ranger in Sumeru. Patient and precise, he educates others about the forest with firm but genuine care.

name: Venti
title: Windborne Bard
description: A bard who frequents the city of Mondstadt and loves wine. He is secretly Barbatos, the Anemo Archon and eternal protector of freedom.

name: Wanderer
title: Eons Lost in an Instant
description: Once known as Scaramouche, the sixth Fatui Harbinger. After severing his past, he wanders the world seeking his own meaning.

name: Wriothesley
title: The Duke of Fortress Meropide
description: Duke of Fontaine's underwater prison. A man of iron rules who rose from being an inmate to running the entire facility himself.

name: Xiangling
title: Exquisite Delicacy
description: Head chef at Wanmin Restaurant and an inventive culinary genius. She puts her beloved Guoba into every dish and will cook anything she finds.

name: Xianyun
title: White Crane Spreads Wings
description: An adeptus who descends from Jueyun Karst. She has spent centuries learning human customs and now runs a teahouse in Liyue Harbor.

name: Xiao
title: Guardian Yaksha
description: A yaksha adeptus who has guarded Liyue for millennia. He bears the weight of countless karmic sins and walks a solitary, painful path.

name: Xilonen
title: Warrior of the Sun's Reign
description: A Loom-Keeper from Natlan and devoted disciple of the sun. She battles with golden geo energy and a spirit forged in fire.

name: Xingqiu
title: Juvenile Galant
description: Second son of the Feiyun Commerce Guild. A book-loving young noble who wields the Guhua Sword Art with elegance and quiet ambition.

name: Xinyan
title: Rock 'N' Roll Wildfire
description: Liyue's first and only rock musician. She plays with explosive passion and works hard to win fans for a genre the city isn't sure it's ready for.

name: Yae Miko
title: Guuji
description: Guuji of the Grand Narukami Shrine and editor-in-chief of Yae Publishing House. An ancient kitsune with a sharp wit and inscrutable motives.

name: Yanfei
title: Wise Innocence
description: A well-known legal adviser in Liyue. Half-adeptus by blood, she interprets Liyue's complex laws with enthusiasm and creative flair.

name: Yaoyao
title: Burgeoning Grace
description: Cloud Retainer's disciple and Ganyu's former junior. A cheerful and kind girl who heals with the power of radish-throwing Yuegui.

name: Yelan
title: Detective
description: A mysterious contract investigator who works in the shadows of Liyue. Her true allegiances are unknown, but her information is always accurate.

name: Yoimiya
title: Queen of the Summer Festival
description: Master of Naganohara Fireworks. She creates breathtaking fireworks displays and brings joy to everyone around her with radiant enthusiasm.

name: Yun Jin
title: Stage Lucida
description: Director and lead actress of the Yun-Han Opera Troupe. A passionate performer who carries on traditional Liyue opera with modern dedication.

name: Zhongli
title: Vago Mundo
description: A consultant for the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor who seems to know everything about Liyue's history. He is secretly Rex Lapis, the Geo Archon.

name: Nefer
description: The deceptions ends here

name: Skirk
title: The Foul's Disciple
description: A mysterious swordswoman and Childe's master who dwells in the darkest corners of the Abyss.

name: Dahlia
title: Deacon of the Church
description: A deacon of the Church of Favonius in Mondstadt, known for his calm demeanor and dedication.

name: Ineffa
title: Data Weaver
description: Gelişmiş teknolojiyi Elektro enerjisiyle birleştiren bir mühendis. Kulaklıkları ve visorü aracılığıyla savaş alanındaki verileri gerçek zamanlı analiz eder.

name: Aino
title: Ocean's Melody
description: A young enginner.

name: Nefer
title: Emerald Vizier
description: A high-ranking official from the desert regions of Sumeru, using the power of flora to create lush oases in the sand.

name: Durin
title: Shadow of the Dragon
description: A human personification of the fallen dragon Durin, seeking redemption through the searing flames of rebirth.

name: Columbina
title: The Damselette
description: The Third of the Fatui Harbingers. Behind her innocent appearance lies a power that even Tartaglia fears.

name: Zibai
title: Jade Reflection
description: A wandering scholar of the Guyun Stone Forest, seeking to uncover the ancient memories hidden within Teyvat's rock formations.

name: Illuga
title: Silent Frost Warden
description: A stoic warrior who guards the silver mines of the north. His movements are as precise and unyielding as the stone he commands.

name: Varka
title: Grand Master of the Knights of Favonius
description: The legendary Knight of Boreas and current Grand Master of Mondstadt, currently leading an expedition.

name: Linnea
title: Pink Petal Alchemist
description: A cheerful alchemist from Fontaine known for her unique ability to transmute minerals into beautiful, crystalline flowers.
